name: Tuna-Swiss Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the pie shell.
2. In a bowl, toss together the tuna, shredded Swiss cheese, chopped green onion.
3. Spoon the mixture into the pastry-lined pie shell.
4. In another bowl, stir together the remaining ingredients: eggs, mayonnaise, and milk.
5. Slowly pour the egg mixture over the tuna mixture.
6. Bake for 50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
